zh.lifeSummary: 當Christopher Standish Sir, Lord of Duxbury Manor, 14th ggf於1460年出生在英國藍卡爾度波利時，他的父親Sir James de Standish II31歲，母親Alice Poole31歲。他於1480年與Alice Poole在英國英格蘭藍卡爾度波利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1495年9月1日在他的家鄉享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christopher Standish Sir, Lord of Duxbury Manor, 14th ggf于1460年出生在英国藍卡爾度波利时，他的父亲Sir James de Standish II31岁，母亲Alice Poole31岁。他于1480年与Alice Poole在英国英格兰藍卡爾度波利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1495年9月1日在他的家乡享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Standish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Standish (Lancashire, now part of Greater Manchester), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + edisc ‘enclosure, enclosed park’. Standish (Gloucestershire) does not appear to have contributed towards the surname.

History: Myles Standish (c. 1584–1656) was a soldier of fortune, from 1620 captain of the Mayflower Pilgrims at Plymouth Colony. Little is known of his origins and early life, but in his will he claimed to be descended from a leading Catholic family, the Standishes of Standish, Lancashire, England. He also claimed to have been deprived of his inheritance, a claim not confirmed.

variants.name: Standage
meanings: in Leicestershire and Buckinghamshire, the name may alternatively be from Stanedge Grange in Hartington Nether Quarter or Stanage End in Outseats (both Derbyshire); but evidence is needed for this. The placenames derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ecg ‘edge, escarpment’.

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Christopher Standish Sir, Lord of Duxbury Manor, 14th ggf was born in 1460, in Duxbury, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir James de Standish II, was 31 and his mother, Alice Poole, was 31. He married Alice Poole in 1480, in Duxbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 1 September 1495, in his hometown, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christopher Standish Sir, Lord of Duxbury Manor, 14th ggf est né en 1460, à Duxbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir James de Standish II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice Poole, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Alice Poole en 1480, à Duxbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 1 septembre 1495, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christopher Standish Sir, Lord of Duxbury Manor, 14th ggf 1460 in Duxbury, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir James de Standish II 31 und seine Mutter Alice Poole 31. Er hat 1480 in Duxbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Alice Poole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 1. September 1495 im Alter von 35 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christopher Standish Sir, Lord of Duxbury Manor, 14th ggf è nato il nel 1460 nel Duxbury, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir James de Standish II, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Alice Poole, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Alice Poole nel 1480, nel Duxbury, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 1 settembre 1495, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christopher Standish Sir, Lord of Duxbury Manor, 14th ggfが1460年にイギリスランカシュアイアダクスブリーで生まれた時，父Sir James de Standish IIは31歳，母Alice Pooleは31歳であった。1480年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアダクスブリーでAlice Pooleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1495年9月1日に故郷で35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christopher Standish Sir, Lord of Duxbury Manor, 14th ggf(이)가 1460년 영국 랭카실르 드스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James de Standish II(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Poole(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 드스버이에서 Alice Poole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1495년 9월 1일 그의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christopher Standish Sir, Lord of Duxbury Manor, 14th ggf nasceu em 1460, em Duxbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir James de Standish II, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alice Poole, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Poole em 1480, em Duxbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1495, em sua cidade natal, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christopher Standish Sir, Lord of Duxbury Manor, 14th ggf родился в 1460 г. в местности дуксбури, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir James de Standish II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Poole, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Poole в 1480 г. в местности дуксбури, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 1 сентября 1495 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 35 лет.
